div.p: The official URL for this implementation guide is:
FHIR Implementation Guide for immunization campaign microplanning, supporting campaign definition, task generation, and execution tracking.

description.value: FHIR Implementation Guide for immunization campaign microplanning, supporting campaign definition, task generation, and execution tracking.

valueMarkdown.value: Automatically added as a dependency - all IGs depend on HL7 Terminology
Automatically added as a dependency - all IGs depend on the HL7 Extension Pack

description.value: These define activities that can be performed as part of content in this implementation guide.
These define workflows, rules, strategies, or protocols as part of content in this implementation guide.
These define constraints on FHIR resources for systems conforming to this implementation guide.
These define constraints on FHIR data types for systems conforming to this implementation guide.
These define sets of codes used by systems conforming to this implementation guide.
These define new code systems used by systems conforming to this implementation guide.
These are example instances that show what data produced and consumed by systems conforming with this implementation guide might look like.
Administer bivalent oral polio vaccine (bOPV) to all children 0–59 months at a vaccination site.
Post-campaign rapid coverage assessment at health facility catchment area level.
Supervisory visit to monitor and support campaign execution at the district level.
Campaign template for a Polio Supplementary Immunization Activity targeting children 0–59 months.
An instantiated immunization campaign for a specific geographic area and time period.
A location in the immunization campaign hierarchy, from country down to vaccination site.
A campaign template that defines activities and which location hierarchy levels they target.
Estimated target population for vaccination at a specific location.
A concrete campaign activity assigned to a team at a specific location and time.
Links a resource to a location in the campaign hierarchy.
Specifies which level of the location hierarchy a PlanDefinition action targets for Task generation.
Types of activities performed during an immunization campaign.
Administrative levels in the immunization campaign location hierarchy.
Roles of participants in immunization campaign activities.
Types of activities performed during an immunization campaign.
Administrative levels in the immunization campaign location hierarchy.
Roles of participants in immunization campaign activities.
Post-campaign rapid coverage monitoring at Riverside Health Center catchment.
Example province-level location.
Example country-level location.
Instantiated Polio SIA campaign for Riverside District.
Example district-level location.
Example health facility.
Example fixed-post vaccination site.
Example house-to-house vaccination site area.
Supervisor monitoring visit for Riverside District on campaign day 2.
Aggregate estimated target population for the district campaign area.
Estimated target population of children 0–59 months at Site Alpha.
Estimated target population of children 0–59 months at Site Beta.
OPV vaccination session at Site Alpha on campaign day 1.
OPV vaccination session at Site Beta on campaign day 1.
